name: urlscan.io
overview:
● Description: urlscan.io is a web-based service that scans and analyzes websites, providing detailed information about their behavior, content, and potential security threats. It captures screenshots, analyzes HTTP requests, JavaScript execution, and identifies potentially malicious behaviors.

● Category: Reconnaissance, OSINT (Open Source Intelligence), Threat Intelligence

● Developer/Maintainer: urlscan.io Ltd (founded by Johannes Gilger)

● License: Free for basic use; premium subscriptions available for advanced features

● Official Resources:

○ Website: https://urlscan.io

○ API Documentation: https://urlscan.io/docs/api/

○ Twitter/X: https://twitter.com/urlscan_io

core_modules.name: SANDBOX_SCAN
core_modules.title: Automated Browser Session Analysis
core_modules.description: Launches a headless browser session to map loaded URLs, DOM structures, cookies, redirects, and network requests.

steps.name: VERIFY CURL
steps.desc: Verify curl is installed for API requests.

steps.name: SET API KEY
steps.desc: Add urlscan.io API token to environment.

scenarios.name: Test Scenarios & Commands
objectiveList: ○       Enter a URL in the search box

troubleshooting.cause: Exceeded request quota for the current API key subscription tier.
troubleshooting.resolution: Register for a higher tier or distribute requests over time.

security: Ensure all execution requests with urlscan.io are performed within authorized scope. Log all output artifacts securely and protect the integrity of local credential wordlists.
